products.name: Aceto Balsamico Tradizionale di Modena DOP
pros: Authentic traditional production from selected grape must
Long aging period for complex flavor
Protected DOP status ensures quality standards

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 review identifies Aceto Balsamico Tradizionale di Modena DOP as the most authentic choice and Aceto Balsamico di Modena IGP as the most accessible, with evidence fresh as of 2025-08-29.
videoSource: Aceto balsamico: come scegliere quello giusto
